name: heading_tag
label: Heading level
help_text: Choose a heading level. H1 is the largest, followed by H2, and so on

name: checkout
label: Payment button text
inline_help_text: Make sure it’s clear that clicking this button will allow your customer to pay.

name: need_signature
label: Explanation text when signatures are needed
inline_help_text: If signatures are required before payment, your customer will see this message until all required signatures are completed.
default: Payment can't be made because the quote isn't fully signed.

name: make_first_payment
label: Button text for payment schedules
inline_help_text: Your customer will see this in the payment button until they've paid the first installment.

name: checkout_error
label: Checkout error message
inline_help_text: Tell your customer what to do when there's a problem starting checkout.
default: There was a problem setting up checkout. Please contact the person who sent you this quote.

name: payment_status_error
label: Payment status error message
inline_help_text: Tell your customer to refresh the page when fetching payment status fails.
default: There was a problem loading the payment status for this quote. Please try refreshing the page.

name: test_mode
label: Test mode
default: This is a test quote, so it can't collect real payments.

name: payment_removed
label: Checkout error message
default: To checkout, please contact the person who sent you this quote.
